SessionStart.command: echo '[hive] ML/CUDA session started' && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,memory.total --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null || echo 'GPU not available'
SessionStart.description: Log session start with GPU info

Stop.command: echo '[hive] Session stopped' && python3 -c 'import torch; print(f"GPU memory allocated: {torch.cuda.memory_allocated()/1e9:.2f}GB")' 2>/dev/null || true

PreCompact.command: echo '[hive] Context compaction — saving experiment state'
